opinion.h: BLAUSTEIN v. AIELLO, SUBSTITUTE TRUSTEE. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF MARYLAND. No. 570. Decided January 7, 1963.
opinion.p: Albert A. Rapoport and Carl W. Berueffy for appellant.
J. Douglas Bradshaw and Howard J. Thomas for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h: VICKERS v. TOWNSHIP COMMITTEE OF GLOUCESTER TOWNSHIP, 371 U.S. 233 (1963)
opinion.p: 371 U.S. 233 VICKERS v. TOWNSHIP COMMITTEE OF GLOUCESTER TOWNSHIP ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 572. Decided January 7, 1963.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
